description_pairs.source_description: Low-level headless table component built on top of TanStack Table. Accepts a table instance and renders thead/tbody/tfoot with full control over row grouping, virtualization, custom row/footer content, resize handles, sort indicators, and sticky header/footer.
description_pairs.data_description: BaseTable is a low-level, headless table component built on top of TanStack Table. It provides full control over rendering and behavior through a tanstack table instance. Supports sticky header/footer, row grouping, virtualization, custom row content, resize handles, and sort indicators.

description_pairs.source_description: Wraps a list of sortable items in DnD-kit SortableContext and exposes drag state via SortableListContext. Accepts items (string IDs), optional drag callbacks, and optional nesting support (with configurable offset thresholds). Must be used inside SortableListDndContext.
Provides the DnD-kit DndContext with PointerSensor, rectIntersection collision detection, and WhileDragging measuring strategy. Optionally accepts dnd-kit modifiers. Wraps SortableList instances.

Renders a panel of icon+title action items. Supports optional CSS transition animation (toggleAnimation), disabled/hidden state (disable), per-item custom wrappers (wrapTo), drag-and-drop item props, and QA selectors. Uses CSSTransition for animated show/hide.

Context provider that enables drag-and-drop for DashKit. Manages drag state (dragProps), a transparent drag image preview (overridable via dragImageSrc), and exposes onDragStart/onDragEnd/onDropDragOver callbacks through DashKitDnDContext to child DashKit instances.
